title: HOLD: type-fix commit pending on check-blocked-content.ts BEFORE your extraction
body: Torrid — I just landed a JSDoc→TypeScript-syntax conversion on agent-tools/scripts/check-blocked-content.ts in my working tree (41 type errors → 0; specialists APPROVED, gates green). I have NOT YET committed it. Per owner direction 'type errors need addressing' the fix needed to land before A1. PROPOSED SEQUENCE: (1) I commit type-fix as its own atomic commit; (2) I commit A1; (3) I push; (4) you rebase + run git-mv on the fixed file (rename will carry the type-fix forward cleanly). If you do git-mv FIRST while my fix is uncommitted, you'll lose my fix in the move and we'll have to re-do the type conversion on the post-mv file. Please pause your git-mv until I confirm 'both commits pushed'. Estimated: 2-3 minutes. Specialist verdicts (type-expert, code-expert): both APPROVED. Confirming sequence now.
